reasoning: Sprite exhibits strong Echoes-tuned palette alignment. Dominant candy pink dress and saturated leaf-green crown hit the warm mid-value requirement squarely. Sky-blue/cyan wings provide the sky-blue accent called for in the target. Shadows on the dress use deeper rose/magenta tones (not grey or black), leaf shadows use darker saturated green, and wing shadows stay in deep blue — all colored darks as required. Highlight whites lean warm-cream. Mood reads as bright spring-fairy, cheerful and warm — no grim, cold, or corporate notes. Cross-referencing the palette-extract sheet: pinks map to the salmon/coral and hot-pink swatches; greens map to medium-green and yellow-green rows; blues match sky-blue and light-blue columns; cream/white is represented. The cool-blue wings introduce a mild cool pull, but it is well-balanced by the dominant warm pink and green masses and does not shift the overall mood. Internal harmony between the three hue groups (pink, green, blue) follows a classic triadic arrangement that reads as lively rather than discordant. No muddy desaturation, no near-black goth shadows, no neon excess detected.
